issue: Catastral auto-fill missed manualCorrections; cadastralReference blocked form navigation when IBI absent
text: Two related bugs fixed together. (1) The auto-fill effect in EnergyCertificateSection.tsx read only extractedData.referenciaCatastral, but when a user manually corrects the catastral in the IBI step it goes into manualCorrections.referenciaCatastral. Fix: read manualCorrections first, fall back to extractedData. Also added both paths to the useEffect dependency array. (2) cadastralReference was a validated required field in validateEcStep (frontend) and isEcDataComplete (backend), blocking form navigation and completion when no IBI was uploaded. Fix: removed it from both validation functions so users can proceed without it. The status will naturally be pending until the user chooses to complete the survey using the remaining required fields.
